attention.text:
{div.margin-top-1}[The migration process for web wallets is ONLY available from the web domain [https://dex.wavesplatform.com](https://dex.wavesplatform.com/) and [https://client.wavesplatform.com](https://client.wavesplatform.com/). To complete migration for the desktop client you have to use the Decentral.Exchange desktop application you have already installed.]

{div.margin-top-1}[Do not use any other domains for migration, do not input your seed phrases and/or private keys anywhere, and do not download any other clients aside from the software indicated for the migration process from your current Decentral.Exchange client. The migration process does not require you to input your seed phrases and/or private keys anywhere. Waves Platform or Waves.Exchange employees will never ask you to provide any kind of personal information, including private keys and/or seed phrases.]

{div.margin-top-1}[The migration process is absolutely free, and it will not affect any gateways, which will process all transactions as normal. You do not need to pay or send any tokens to anyone to complete migration.]
attention.title: ATTENTION!!!

faq.text1: Decentral.Exchange is transforming into a new product, Waves.Exchange. Don’t worry! All of your tokens, seed phrases and passwords are completely safe.
faq.text10:
{div.margin-bottom}[If you are using the old apps, you will NO LONGER BE ABLE TO:]
{div.line}[- Create accounts]
{div.line}[- Have access to the Decentral.Exchange interface]
{div.line}[- View your portfolio]
{div.line}[- Make transactions of any kind: transfer, issue or burn tokens, lease DCC or cancel leasing]
{div.line}[- Use any gateways]

{div.margin-bottom}[As of December 2, 2019, you will be able to enjoy this functionality with Waves.Exchange apps.]

{div.margin-bottom}[However, with the old apps, you will STILL BE ABLE TO:]

{div.line}[- Log into your accounts]
{div.line}[- Initiate the process of migration to Waves.Exchange]
{div.line}[- Create a local backup of your seed phrases]

{div.margin-top}[If you still have questions, you can send a message to our [official Telegram group](https://t.me/wavesexchange) or create a ticket on the support page: [https://support.waves.exchange/](https://support.waves.exchange/)]
faq.text11: No, never! This will not happen under any circumstances. All seed phrases will still be stored locally on your devices. It is impossible for the exchange to gain access to that storage.
faq.text12: Ownership of your tokens is recorded on the Waves blockchain. Tokens stored in your accounts can only be accessed with seed phrases or private keys that will not change after the migration and will not leave your devices. Your assets are completely safe!
faq.text13:
{div.margin-bottom}[We’ll do our best to ensure the migration process is as smooth as possible for users. Because of changes to the matcher’s address and private key, we won’t be able to move your orders to the new matcher. Therefore, your entire order history will no longer be available. All your completed transactions can still be viewed using Waves Explorer. ]

{div.margin-bottom}[Apart from your order history, all your active orders will be cancelled on December 2. This is a necessary measure caused by the switch to a new matcher. In the case of successful migration, you will still retain:]
{div.line}[– A set of pinned assets on your dashboard]
{div.line}[– Saved pairs on the exchange]
{div.line}[– A list of “hidden” assets]
{div.line}[– Language preferences]
{div.line}[– Account information (seed phrases, account names)]

{div.margin-bottom.margin-top}[Please keep in mind that technical work will take place on December 2, upon which access to old apps will be restricted and new apps will be prepared for launch. ]

{div.margin-bottom}[During this work, gateways will process all transactions (deposit and withdrawal) as normal, which will ensure full security and access to your funds.]

{div.margin-top}[You won’t be left without support! You can always send a message to our [official Telegram group](https://t.me/wavesexchange) or create a ticket on the support page: [https://support.waves.exchange/](https://support.waves.exchange/)]
faq.text14:
{div}[The migration process will take roughly eight hours. During that time, you won’t have full access to your apps. We’d like to remind you that the migration process is scheduled for Monday, December 2, 2019. During the technical work that will take place that day, gateways will process all transactions as normal, which will ensure full security and access to your funds.]

{div}[Support is at hand! You can always send a message to our [official Telegram group](https://t.me/wavesexchange) or create a ticket on the support page: [https://support.waves.exchange/](https://support.waves.exchange/)]
faq.text15: On December 2, users will need to log into the Waves mobile app and hit the Update button. The app will be updated to version 2.7.0. The update will be available on Google Play and the App Store before the end of the day on Monday, December 2, 2019.
faq.text16: Currently, KYC is only required for deposit/withdrawal of wUSD and wEUR from/to your bank account. At the moment, the team has no plans to introduce KYC for trading or cryptocurrency transactions.
faq.text17: The matcher will get a new address and URL, and its private key will change. Due to these changes, users’ open orders at the time of update will automatically be cancelled and transaction histories will become unavailable. Unfortunately, there is no technical means of transferring orders and transaction histories to the new matcher, because each order is sent to the matcher after the user signs it with their private key. Since neither the old or new matcher can access users’ private keys, orders cannot be transferred. We understand that this might be frustrating, but this approach is a feature of the matcher's design that is required to maintain the safety of users’ funds. We apologize for any inconvenience.
faq.text18:
{div.margin-bottom}[We have done our best to ensure the migration process will be as smooth as possible for users. If you have problems moving your accounts, please start again. To do that, go back to your old web or desktop client, log in with your password and follow the instructions.]

{div.margin-bottom}[Recommendation for browser users: during migration, turn off all browser extensions, since they could impose restrictions, interfering with migration.]

{div.margin-bottom}[Recommendation for desktop client users: turn off your firewall or antivirus software, since they could impose restrictions on port operation, interfering with migration.]

{div.margin-top}[In any case, you will not be left without support! You can always send a message to our [official Telegram group](https://t.me/wavesexchange) or create a ticket on the support page: [https://support.waves.exchange/](https://support.waves.exchange/)]
faq.text19:
{div.margin-bottom}[Some gateways are operated by the Waves.Exchange team, specifically: $BTC, $ETH, $WEST, $ERGO, $BNT and $USDT.]
{div.margin-bottom}[Meanwhile, $LTC, $XMR, $DASH, $BCH, $BSV, $Zcash, wUSD and wEUR are temporarily operated by Coinomat.]
{div.margin-top}[During technical work on December 2, 2019, gateways will process all transactions as normal, which will ensure full security and access to your funds.]
faq.text2: This is a new exchange based on Decentral.Exchange’s technology and expertise. For more details, see [this announcement](https://blog.wavesplatform.com/waves-dex-to-be-spun-off-43da9f6e2a91).
faq.text20: Your leases will not be cancelled during the migration process. Just as before, users will be able to lease their DCC to the nodes they choose, using Waves.Exchange’s leasing interface, and collect interest of up to 7% per year.
faq.text21: The launch of the USDT (ERC-20) gateway will have no impact on the operation of wUSD and wEUR. Users will be able to continue trading them as they wish.
faq.text22: The new addresses belong to the Waves gateway (not Coinomat). We will constantly be improving these gateways, making transfers faster and more convenient for users.
faq.text23: We understand that the migration process may bring some inconvenience for users, so we have prepared a nice surprise! All users who have successfully moved their accounts to the new exchange will receive a glittering avatar, displayed in the app. To receive this, you will need to complete the migration of your accounts from Decentral.Exchange to Waves.Exchange by December 2, and have at least one outgoing transaction of any type in each account to qualify.
faq.text24: We plan to add support for all languages previously available on Decentral.Exchange soon.
faq.text3: Waves.Exchange is developed and run by part of the Decentral.Exchange team, in collaboration with new developers from the Waves community.
faq.text4: The migration signifies a new phase in the development of the exchange, the main priority of which will now be user experience. In addition to focusing on the community’s requests, the new team will concentrate on building new trading tools and comprehensive promotion of the product, which was difficult under the previous arrangement.
faq.text5: Migration has already begun. As of November 18, 2019, you can move your accounts to the new service. To do that, you’ll need to update Decentral.Exchange’s web version and/or run a desktop app, log into your account and follow the instructions.
faq.text6: Yes. This will be the new way to access all of the familiar and convenient tools of the Waves trading ecosystem – including web and desktop apps, mobile apps and the exchange – plus new features and upgrades to the service.
faq.text7: The new exchange’s launch is scheduled for December 2, 2019.
faq.text8: We want to give Decentral.Exchange users enough time to prepare for using the new exchange, so that their access to the service is uninterrupted. We hope that the two-week period will be sufficient for the majority of users to complete the migration process.
faq.text9: Yes, migration of accounts will also be possible after the launch of Waves.Exchange. However, as of December 2, 2019, some restrictions will apply to Decentral.Exchange’s old apps.

step1.button: Mida on vaja teada oma salafraasi kohta
step1.p1: Palun võtke aega, et mõista teie jaoks olulisi asju. 🙏
step1.p2: Me ei saa teie raha tagasi saada ega teie kontot külmutada, kui külastate andmepüügisaite või kaotate varukoopia (salafraas).
step1.p3: Jätkates meie platvormi kasutamist, nõustute nõustuma kõigi riskidega, mis on seotud teie salafraasi kadumisega, sealhulgas, kuid mitte ainult, suutmatus teie raha saada ja neid käsutada. Kui te kaotate oma salafraasi, nõustute ja tunnistate, et Waves Platform ei vastuta selle negatiivsete tagajärgede eest.
step1.title: Tere tulemast Waves Platformi!

step2.cell1: Kasutate oma rahakotti anonüümselt, mis tähendab, et teie kontot ei ole ühendatud e-posti kontoga või muude identifitseerimisandmetega.
step2.cell2: Teie parool kaitseb teie kontot teatud seadmes või brauseris töötades. See on vajalik, et tagada, et teie salafraas ei oleks otse salvestatud mällu.
step2.cell3: Kui unustate oma parooli, saate hõlpsasti luua uue, kasutades oma salafraasi kaudu konto taastamise võimalust. Kui te kaotate oma salafraasi, ei ole teil mingit võimalust oma kontole juurde pääseda.
step2.cell4: Sa ei saa oma salafraasi muuta. Kui saatsite selle kogemata kellelegi või kahtlustate, et petturid on selle üle võtnud, looge kohe uus Waves konto ja kandke oma raha üle.
step2.p1: Konto registreerimisel palutakse teil salvestada teie salafraas ja kaitsta oma kontot parooliga. Tavalistes tsentraliseeritud serverites pööratakse erilist tähelepanu paroolile, mida saab vajadusel e-posti teel muuta ja lähtestada. Detsentraliseeritud platvormidel, nagu näiteks Waves, on kõik paigutatud erinevalt:
step2.title: Mida on vaja teada oma salafraasi kohta

step3.cell2: Ärge kasutage brausereid, millel on laiendused või pluginad mis võivad pääseda teie kontole
step3.cell3: Ärge avage e-kirju või linke tundmatutelt saatjatelt.
step3.cell4Web: Värskendage oma brauserit ja operatsioonisüsteemi regulaarselt.
step3.cell5: Kasutage ametlikku turvatarkvara. Ärge installige tundmatuid programme, mis võisid/võivad olla häkkitud.
step3.cell6: Ärge avage oma rahakotti, kui kasutate avalikku Wi-Fi't või kellegi teise seadet
step3.p1: Üks levinumaid pettuse vorme on andmepüük, mis on siis, kui petturid loovad Facebookis võltsitud kogukonnad või muud autentsete lehekülgedega sarnased veebilehed.
step3.title: Kuidas Kaitsta End Andmepüüdjate Eest
